changelogHtml:
Version 2.5.0-beta01

October 28, 2020

androidx.work:work-*:2.5.0-beta01 is released. Version 2.5.0-beta01 contains these commits.

New Features

  • WorkManager automatically throttles the number of WorkRequests that can be picked up by the in-process scheduler. The requests are still executed in FIFO order. (aosp/1455228)
  • WorkManager attempts to recover when the application’s datastore is in a bad state. (aosp/1463103)

Bug Fixes

  • When ListenableWorkers are interrupted, mark them ENQUEUED immediately so they can be subsequently rescheduled. (aosp/1455618, b/170273988)
